summary: Frontend-only testing of Admin Panel dynamic data completed successfully. All admin tabs show dynamic data from MongoDB as expected. Verified: Overview (23 users, 191 generations), Features (REEL 175, STORY 16), Payments (44 transactions), Visitors (with daily trend chart), Self-Healing (healthy status), Audit Logs (6 total actions), User Management (23 users with credits), Template Analytics (feature usage stats).

minor.issue: WebSocket connection drops frequently and reconnects (flapping), causing console spam but functionality still works

console_warnings.issue: React hydration warnings about span inside tbody/select - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

admin_dashboard_overview.total_users: PASS - Shows 23 Total Users with +23 new
admin_dashboard_overview.visitors: PASS - Shows 23 Visitors with 260 page views

features_tab.usage_distribution: PASS - Progress bars with percentages displayed
features_tab.unique_users_per_feature: PASS - Shows 2 users for Story, 3 users for Reel

payments_tab.daily_revenue_trend: PASS - Chart with date-based trend displayed

realtime_analytics.page_load: PASS - Page loads with 'Real-Time Analytics' title
realtime_analytics.reel_story_distribution: PASS - Shows REEL and STORY breakdown
realtime_analytics.websocket_connection: PARTIAL - WebSocket connects but has reconnection flapping
realtime_analytics.recent_activity: PASS - Shows recent REEL and STORY generated items

audit_logs.log_entries: PASS - Shows 6 log entries with timestamps, admin email, action types
audit_logs.actions_displayed: PASS - worker_scale, template_create, config_update actions visible

user_management.user_list: PASS - User list with names, emails, roles, joined dates
user_management.actions: PASS - Reset and Unlimited buttons available

template_analytics.page_load: PASS - Page loads with 'Template Analytics' title
template_analytics.revenue_impact: PASS - Shows $17.85 Total Revenue, 178.5 Credits Consumed, $0.6 Avg Daily
template_analytics.feature_breakdown: PASS - Story Hook (10 gens, 80 credits), Offer Generator (2 gens, 40 credits), etc.
template_analytics.feature_performance: PASS - Cards showing generations, users, credits, avg time per feature

action_items: OPTIONAL: Investigate WebSocket flapping in Real-Time Analytics page (connects but immediately closes and reconnects)
OPTIONAL: Fix React hydration warnings in AuditLogs and AdminUsersManagement (span inside tbody/select)
critical_code_review_comments: All admin panel tabs displaying dynamic data correctly from MongoDB
Features Tab correctly shows REEL (175) and STORY (16) with percentages
Payments Tab shows 44 transactions as expected
Audit Logs page shows 6 total actions with proper log entries
User Management shows 23 users with credits information
Template Analytics shows comprehensive feature usage statistics

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All admin tabs showing dynamic data correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel frontend testing complete. All dynamic data is displaying correctly: Overview (23 users, 191 generations), Features (REEL 175, STORY 16), Payments (44 transactions), Self-Healing (healthy status), Audit Logs (6 actions), User Management (23 users with credits), Template Analytics (feature usage). Minor issue: WebSocket flapping in Real-Time Analytics but functionality works. React hydration warnings in tables are cosmetic.
